answer: Plaid offers a free Sandbox environment for unlimited testing with test data [1][2][3]. For production data, developers in the US and Canada can use the free Trial plan, which supports up to 10 connected items and access to core products [1][2][4]. Previously created accounts may instead use Limited Production, which allows 200 live API calls per product for testing [5][2]. Beyond these limits, Plaid uses a Pay-as-you-go model with no upfront commitments or minimum spend, as well as tiered plans for higher volumes [5][1][6]. You can manage your access via the Plaid Dashboard [1][7].
